text: 📦 Incoming this week: the Mega Greninja ex Premium Collection (July 3) — 8 boosters, a foil Greninja ex promo + an oversized card. Worth watching for at retailers 👀 #PokemonTCG
🖤 The next main set, Pitch Black, lands July 17 — headlined by Mega Darkrai ex & Mega Zeraora ex (boosters, ETBs & collections). Lock in a preorder early if it's on your list 👀 #PokemonTCG
⏰ Pokémon Center tip: no fixed schedule, but restocks most often hit midweek (Tue/Thu) in the ~12–4pm ET window. Point your alerts there 🔔 #PokemonTCG #Restock

The 2025 World Championships Decks are out — card-for-card replicas of the Anaheim title-contender decks. Picking any up to play? 🏆 #PokemonTCG
Restock 101: turn on notifications for accounts you trust, save your payment info, and be quick — the best drops vanish in minutes ⏱️ #PokemonTCG #Restock
First Partner Illustration Collection S2 is out — whose partners are you chasing? 🎨
Lumiose City Mini Tins are around too — 2 boosters + a sticker sheet & art card each, five to collect. A cheap way to chase packs 🎴 #PokemonTCG
